title: When did integrations start getting copied when a board is duplicated?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
I haven’t been in the monday world long so I don’t know how things used to be. I’ve been impressed at the speed that enhancements have been rolled out lately.

However, it would be great if we could get a regular (monthly? b-weekly?) summary of what has been released. Some of the big stuff gets an announcement, but not everything.

Room for improvement. Thanks monday!
